applicable_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2025修订版)

applicable_clauses.text: 同一发票最多报销1次。发现同一发票在不同报销单中重复出现的,应认定为重复报销风险。
applicable_clauses.applicability_reason: This clause governs all invoices submitted during the 2025 calendar year. All 12 audited records have expense dates and reimburse dates within 2025.

applicable_policies.applicability_reason: Effective from 2025-01-01 per Article 14. Covers the entire audit period (2025-01-01 to 2025-12-31). Explicitly repealed the 2022 version.

excluded_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)
excluded_policies.exclusion_reason: Repealed by 2025 revision effective 2025-01-01. Self-identifies as archival only (Article 1). Contains no duplicate invoice rule. No records in the audit period pre-date its repeal.
